findings.title: Unsanitized user input in SQL queries
findings.description: Raw SQL string concatenation in auth handler allows injection.

findings.title: No test coverage for payment processing
findings.description: Payment module has 0% test coverage. Critical business logic untested.

findings.title: API endpoints missing rate limiting
findings.description: All public endpoints lack rate limiting, vulnerable to abuse.

findings.title: Inconsistent error response format
findings.description: Some endpoints return {error: string}, others return {message: string, code: int}.

scores.rubric: README exists but API docs missing

beads.title: Fix Sql Injection
beads.description: Parameterize all SQL queries in auth handler. Replace string concatenation with prepared statements.

beads.title: Add Payment Tests
beads.description: Write comprehensive test suite for payment processing module. Cover happy path, edge cases, and error scenarios.

beads.title: Add Rate Limiting
beads.description: Add express-rate-limit middleware to all public API endpoints. Configure per-endpoint limits.

beads.title: Standardize Errors
beads.description: Create unified error response class. Migrate all endpoints to consistent format.
